commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces `getCommandPathInternal`'s hardcoded CLI flag terminator string with `FLAG_TERMINATOR` and updates the argv terminator regression fixture to use the shared constant.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level inconsistency: current main imports and uses `FLAG_TERMINATOR` in adjacent argv helpers while `getCommandPathInternal` still checks a literal at `src/cli/argv.ts:225`. No current runtime failure was observed because the constant currently equals `--`.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-supplied real behavior proof is needed before merge; there is no code repair for ClawSweeper to generate.

target.title: fix(cli): use flag terminator constant
target.body:
## Summary
- replace the hardcoded `--` comparison in command path parsing with `FLAG_TERMINATOR`
- update the argv terminator regression test to use the shared constant

Fixes #83902

## Test plan
- corepack pnpm exec vitest run src/cli/argv.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts
- corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/cli/argv.ts src/cli/argv.test.ts
- git diff --check


## Real behavior proof
- Ran the argv regression test against this branch on a real local OpenClaw checkout:
  `corepack pnpm exec vitest run src/cli/argv.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts`
- Result: 86 tests passed.
- Also verified formatting and whitespace:
  `corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/cli/argv.ts src/cli/argv.test.ts`
  `git diff --check`
target.author: humanbeingz-7
